emails.subject: Re: LETTER OF UNDERSTANDINDG
emails.body: Re: LETTER OF UNDERSTANDINDG Ran this by Mike Grigsby. His last recollection is that we never agreed to include the San Juan basin for the purpose of this valuation. Can you please advise.? If San Juan is included, non-bondad is the correct reference. The adjustment for the potential reallocation is okay. I am at x31688. thanks Stephanie Gerald Nemec@ECT 04/19/2001 01:54 PM
